Memory allocation and deallocation functions for the Pebble firmware.

# Purpose
This header file declares a set of memory management functions for dynamic memory allocation and deallocation. The function [`os_malloc`](<#os_malloc>) allocates a block of memory of a specified size and returns a pointer to the beginning of the block. The function [`os_malloc_check`](<#os_malloc_check>) also allocates memory but includes additional checks to ensure successful allocation. The function [`os_free`](<#os_free>) deallocates a previously allocated block of memory, freeing it for future use. These functions provide a basic interface for managing memory in C programs.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `stddef.h`
